title: Buttery Smoky Argentinian Beef Roast
description: A juicy, buttery roast infused with smoky paprika and sweet dried cherries, perfect for a Mediterranean‑friendly feast.

ingredients.name: Beef round roast (boneless, 4‑5 lb)
ingredients.notes: Trim excess fat and score lightly

instructions: Pat the roast dry with paper towels and season generously with salt and pepper.
In a small bowl, mix softened butter, smoked paprika, rosemary, minced garlic, and a pinch of salt; gently work the mixture into the scored surface of the roast.
Arrange the roast in a shallow roasting pan and drizzle with olive oil.
Scatter rinsed dried cherries around the roast.
Pour red wine and beef broth into the pan to keep the meat moist during roasting.
Cover tightly with foil or a lid and roast for 2 hours, then remove the cover and continue roasting for an additional 20 minutes to develop a golden crust.
Let the roast rest for 15 minutes before slicing.
Serve sliced with a drizzle of pan juices and a sprinkle of fresh rosemary.
Enjoy with a side of Mediterranean salad or roasted vegetables.
